resources.string: Shows the latest active tmux session count.
PocketShell needs camera access to scan QR codes from your desktop. Camera frames are processed on-device and never leave your phone.
Point the camera at the QR code shown by the PocketShell desktop helper. PocketShell never uploads the camera feed — codes are decoded locally.
Camera access is required to scan QR codes. Grant the permission in system settings, or use Import from a saved file instead.
Pick a saved QR or JSON file
Could not decode that QR. Hold the phone steady and try again.
